rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes a load-bearing logical claim ('uniform-state-of-the-art F1 scores across all benchmark datasets') that is directly contradicted by the reported data: SMAP (0.79 vs prior SOTA 0.83) and WADI (0.74 vs prior SOTA 0.78) are regressions, not advances. Internal consistency between the abstract claim and the per-dataset evidence is centrally at stake.
rationale.R1.3: Four of six datasets either tie or regress against prior SOTA, yet the opening sentence asserts uniform SOTA across all six. The evidence-claim gap is prominent and fact-checkable from within the artifact itself, making this a central expected responsibility regardless of interpretation.
